caption: In the video, a man is seated in front of a backdrop featuring the title "Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle" with a lush jungle scene and a waterfall. He is wearing a plaid shirt and appears to be engaged in an interview or discussion. His gestures suggest he is explaining something, as he moves his hands expressively while speaking. The setting indicates that this is likely a promotional event or press conference for the movie, given the prominent display of the film's title and imagery. The man seems animated and passionate as he talks, possibly sharing insights or anecdotes related to the film.
